tasks.title: TradingAgents KR Investment Briefing
tasks.prompt: Use $tradingagents-daily-investment-work in kr mode from the local C:\Projects\TradingAgents project. Prepare the canonical local event, fail closed on stale or unavailable local data, verify full holdings and watchlist production coverage, compose the mobile-first Korean KR intraday briefing with COVERAGE_RECEIPT and MOBILE_HANDOFF, then acknowledge the exact event and emit its receipt/state. This is a local-host task: never use Chrome or the ChatGPT web composer, never claim ChatGPT web/mobile read private local state, and never claim Telegram or Pages delivery completed without an external delivery receipt.
